---
title: "aisdk.skills"
subtitle: "Skill Authoring, Store, and Bundled Skill Pack"
---

Skill-ecosystem tooling and content for `aisdk`: scaffolding helpers for
authoring new skills, a global skill **store** for sharing and installing
skills, skill-forge authoring tools, and a bundled pack of ready-to-use skills.
On load it registers its bundled skill directory with the core skill registry,
so the core skill-loading runtime stays free of this content.

- **Status:** development (GitHub)
- **Source:** [github.com/YuLab-SMU/aisdk.skills](https://github.com/YuLab-SMU/aisdk.skills)

## Install

```r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("YuLab-SMU/aisdk.skills")
```

## Highlights

- Author new skills with scaffolding helpers and skill-forge tools.
- A global skill store for sharing and installing skills.
- A bundled pack of ready-to-use skills, registered with the core on load.
